title: GOAT Royalty Living Investor EPK
owner: Life Imitates Art Inc. / DJ Speedy / Ms Money Penny
positioning: Local-first creator operating system for music royalties, studio control, AI agents, cinematic media, GOAT City RP, VIP casino gating, and investor evidence.
standard: Core use stays owner-controlled, local-drive and server-first, with no required outside login or mandatory API dependency. External products are optional connector lanes.

seed_metrics.label: Seed Ask
seed_metrics.note: Target raise to finish Thor migration, compliance gates, studio pilots, engineering polish, and investor-grade launch.

seed_metrics.label: Pre-Money Anchor
seed_metrics.note: Working seed-stage valuation anchor based on local-first IP stack, app suite breadth, studio domain expertise, and deployable agent architecture.

seed_metrics.label: Build Posture
seed_metrics.note: Enough exists to demo, audit, price, and raise; remaining work is hardening, proofs, legal review, security, and hardware migration.

seed_metrics.label: Local Model Catalog
seed_metrics.note: Local catalog target with visible installed/runtime model lanes tracked separately from downloads and hardware capacity.

seed_metrics.label: GOAT Surfaces
seed_metrics.note: Prior smoke-tested HTML/app surfaces across the GOAT portable web app.

seed_metrics.label: Average Completion
seed_metrics.note: Prior internal feature posture from GOAT app audit records; use as a seed-stage planning number, not audited financial proof.

hardware_lanes.name: Thor / Threadripper Heavy Home
hardware_lanes.role: Primary GPU endpoint and production home for Cody, AGENT-007, local LLM inference, video jobs, RAG indexing, render work, and batch media operations.
hardware_lanes.hardware: Threadripper workstation with dual RTX 5090-class GPU target and high-capacity local/NAS storage lanes.
hardware_lanes.status: Target hardware lane. Build package and migration plan are in progress; final live verification should happen on the actual Thor box.
hardware_lanes.boot_strategy: Golden SSD or NVMe clone is practical for normal x86 workstation builds after drivers, CUDA, Docker, local model paths, and GOAT services are installed and tested.
needs: Final OS and NVIDIA driver baseline
GOAT app and AGENT-007 smoke test on Thor
hardware_lanes.investor_value: Turns the prototype into an owned private AI production appliance for studio, video, training, and agent deployment.

hardware_lanes.name: NVIDIA Jetson AGX Edge Production Node
hardware_lanes.role: Edge AI node for camera pipelines, studio sensors, video intake, control surfaces, kiosk demos, and lightweight local inference near the rooms.
hardware_lanes.hardware: Jetson AGX-class board with NVMe/SSD media, camera inputs, local network, and optional containerized GOAT edge services.
hardware_lanes.status: Installer plan lane. Needs board-specific image, JetPack version choice, and first-boot validation.
hardware_lanes.boot_strategy: AGX can use a prepared NVMe/SSD rootfs after the correct board bootloader/QSPI state is handled once. It is not the same as dropping a generic Mac or PC SSD into any board.
hardware_lanes.investor_value: Makes GOAT physical: studios, classrooms, cameras, displays, and local AI controls become deployable room hardware.

hardware_lanes.name: NVIDIA Jetson Nano Classroom / Kiosk Node
hardware_lanes.role: Small local demo, classroom, signage, model-light agent, simple vision, and touch-screen node for GOAT school and room installs.
hardware_lanes.hardware: Jetson Nano-class board, microSD or supported SSD/NVMe path depending on carrier, local network, and lightweight GOAT kiosk shell.
hardware_lanes.status: Lightweight image lane. Best for UI, demos, small models, and camera tasks; not for heavy LLM or Hollywood render workloads.
hardware_lanes.boot_strategy: Nano is usually microSD or board-specific boot media first. A prebuilt image can make setup easy, but first board flash/boot support depends on the exact Nano/carrier model.
needs: Pick exact Nano revision and carrier
Pin small local model and fallback behavior
hardware_lanes.investor_value: Low-cost physical footprint for investor demos, school rooms, listening lounges, signage, and controlled GOAT app access.

revenue_lanes.name: Super GOAT Royalties / Money Engine
revenue_lanes.value: Royalty collections, catalog ownership, splits, ISRC/UPC, MLC-style records, payout gates, marketing, and tracking proof.

revenue_lanes.name: Studio OS / SSL Mixer / Pro Tools + FL Training
revenue_lanes.value: Recording-school and studio operations layer for real rooms, touch controls, DAW learning, and agent-assisted sessions.

revenue_lanes.name: Cinema Forge / 3D Movie Studio
revenue_lanes.value: Original all-in-one movie, TV, 3D, Unreal, DAZ, Blender, Twinmotion, AI video, RAG, LoRA, render, and export planning surface.

revenue_lanes.name: GOAT City RP / GTA-Style Server Build
revenue_lanes.value: Virtual-world studio school, VIP events, music economy, missions, and owner-approved server deployment path.

revenue_lanes.name: GOAT Casino / VIP
revenue_lanes.value: Private VIP casino shell with Fun Play by default; real-money mode remains locked behind licensing, jurisdiction, KYC/AML, fairness, and owner controls.

revenue_lanes.name: Local Agents / Model Pack
revenue_lanes.value: AGENT-007, Money Penny, Master Oscar, Cody sidekick, clone agents, model drive pickers, local tools, and no-login-first operation.

completion_gates.needed: Run GOAT app, AGENT-007, Cody sidekick, model pulls, GPU inference, local storage, and server sync on the actual Thor machine.
Choose exact board models, JetPack/L4T baselines, first boot media, edge service profile, camera/touch tests, and recovery image.
Keep using the living EPK as the master, then export smaller PDF/PPT decks from it after layout QA.
Finish catalog proof, royalty collection workflows, payout controls, fingerprinting/tracking demos, and legal review.
Continue read-only audits, source-of-truth reports, owner-controlled evidence trails, and counsel review for IP filings.
Keep off by default until licensing, jurisdiction, fairness, AML/KYC, custody, responsible gaming, and counsel approvals are complete.

notes: Do not put passwords, tokens, wallet seeds, private protocol keys, or unapproved private likeness assets into investor-visible pages.
For x86 Thor-style systems, a preinstalled golden SSD is realistic after hardware drivers and service paths are proven.
For Jetson AGX and Nano, expect at least one board-specific bootloader, QSPI, or JetPack validation step before clones become repeatable.
Treat government or AI shutdown headlines as market-risk context only after verifying current sources; do not build investor claims on unverified rumors.
